name: Automated Lead Scraping and CRM Qualification Pipeline

parameters.content:
Perfect! I've built your Automated Lead Scraping and CRM Qualification Pipeline. Let me provide you with the comprehensive documentation you requested:

1. 📊 Visual Workflow Diagram
┌─────────────────────┐
│  Schedule Trigger   │ (Daily at 9:00 AM)
│   (Every Day)       │
└──────────┬──────────┘
           │
           ▼
┌─────────────────────┐
│    Workflow         │ (Configuration Hub)
│  Configuration      │ • API Endpoints
└──────────┬──────────┘ • Qualification Criteria
           │
           ├──────────────────┬──────────────────┬──────────────────┐
           ▼                  ▼                  ▼                  ▼
    ┌──────────┐      ┌──────────┐      ┌──────────┐      ┌──────────┐
    │  Scrape  │      │   Read   │      │  Scrape  │      │  Scrape  │
    │  Public  │      │   RSS    │      │  Social  │      │   Job    │
    │Directory │      │   Feed   │      │ Profiles │      │  Boards  │
    └────┬─────┘      └────┬─────┘      └────┬─────┘      └────┬─────┘
         │                 │                  │                  │
         └─────────────────┴──────────────────┴──────────────────┘
                                    │
                                    ▼
                          ┌──────────────────┐
                          │  Merge All       │
                          │  Sources         │
                          └────────┬─────────┘
                                   │
                                   ▼
                          ┌──────────────────┐
                          │  Parse and       │
                          │  Normalize Data  │
                          └────────┬─────────┘
                                   │
                                   ▼
                          ┌──────────────────┐
                          │  Split Leads     │
                          │  (Individual)    │
                          └────────┬─────────┘
                                   │
                                   ▼
                          ┌──────────────────┐
                          │  Rate Limit      │
                          │  Delay (2s)      │
                          └────────┬─────────┘
                                   │
                                   ▼
                          ┌──────────────────┐
                          │  Enrich with     │
                          │  Clearbit        │
                          └────────┬─────────┘
                                   │
                                   ▼
                          ┌──────────────────┐
                          │  Format          │
                          │  Enriched Data   │
                          └────────┬─────────┘
                                   │
                                   ▼
                          ┌──────────────────┐
                          │  Check           │
                          │  Qualification   │
                          │  Criteria        │
                          └────┬─────────┬───┘
                               │         │
                    (TRUE)     │         │     (FALSE)
                               ▼         ▼
                    ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐
                    │  Add to      │  │  Log         │
                    │  HubSpot CRM │  │  Rejected    │
                    └──────────────┘  │  Leads       │
                                      └──────────────┘
2. 🔧 Required Nodes
Node Name	Type	Purpose
Schedule Trigger	Trigger	Runs workflow daily at 9:00 AM
Workflow Configuration	Set	Centralizes all configuration parameters
Scrape Public Directory	HTTP Request	Fetches data from public directory API
Read RSS Feed	RSS Feed Read	Pulls data from RSS feeds
Scrape Social Profiles	HTTP Request	Retrieves data from social media APIs
Scrape Job Boards	HTTP Request	Scrapes job board listings
Merge All Sources	Merge	Combines data from all 4 sources
Parse and Normalize Data	Code	Standardizes data format across sources
Split Leads	Split Out	Processes leads individually
Rate Limit Delay	Wait	2-second delay to respect API limits
Enrich with Clearbit	Clearbit	Enriches company data
Format Enriched Data	Set	Structures enriched data fields
Check Qualification Criteria	IF	Filters leads based on criteria
Add to HubSpot CRM	HubSpot	Creates/updates qualified contacts
Log Rejected Leads	Set	Logs unqualified leads for review
3. 📋 Step-by-Step Build Guide
Phase 1: Setup Trigger & Configuration
Step 1: Add Schedule Trigger

Triggers workflow daily at 9:00 AM
Ensures consistent lead collection
Step 2: Add Workflow Configuration node

Connect: Schedule Trigger → Workflow Configuration
Centralizes all URLs and qualification criteria
Pre-configured with:
Minimum employees: 50
Target industries: Technology, SaaS, Finance
Minimum revenue: $1,000,000
Phase 2: Data Collection (Parallel Scraping)
Step 3: Add 4 Data Source Nodes

Connect all 4 from Workflow Configuration (parallel execution)
3a. Scrape Public Directory (HTTP Request)

Fetches from public business directories
Uses directoryUrl from configuration
3b. Read RSS Feed (RSS Feed Read)

Monitors industry news feeds
Uses rssFeedUrl from configuration
3c. Scrape Social Profiles (HTTP Request)

Pulls from social media APIs
Uses socialApiUrl from configuration
3d. Scrape Job Boards (HTTP Request)

Extracts company data from job postings
Uses jobBoardUrl from configuration
Phase 3: Data Processing
Step 4: Add Merge All Sources

Connect all 4 scraping nodes → Merge All Sources
Combines data from all sources into single stream
Mode: "Combine All Items"
Step 5: Add Parse and Normalize Data (Code)

Connect: Merge All Sources → Parse and Normalize Data
Standardizes data structure:
Extracts: companyName, email, domain, industry, employees, revenue
Handles different source formats
Cleans domain names
Converts strings to numbers
Step 6: Add Split Leads

Connect: Parse and Normalize Data → Split Leads
Processes each lead individually for enrichment
Phase 4: Enrichment
Step 7: Add Rate Limit Delay

Connect: Split Leads → Rate Limit Delay
2-second delay between API calls
Prevents rate limiting errors
Step 8: Add Enrich with Clearbit

Connect: Rate Limit Delay → Enrich with Clearbit
Enriches company data using domain
Adds: employee count, revenue, location, tech stack
Step 9: Add Format Enriched Data

Connect: Enrich with Clearbit → Format Enriched Data
Structures enriched fields:
enrichedCompanyName
enrichedIndustry
enrichedEmployees
enrichedRevenue
enrichedLocation
enrichedTech
Phase 5: Qualification & CRM Integration
Step 10: Add Check Qualification Criteria (IF)

Connect: Format Enriched Data → Check Qualification Criteria
Evaluates 3 conditions (ALL must be true):
Employees ≥ 50
Revenue ≥ $1,000,000
Industry in [Technology, SaaS, Finance]
Step 11a: Add Add to HubSpot CRM (TRUE branch)

Connect: Check Qualification Criteria (output 0) → Add to HubSpot CRM
Creates/updates contact with:
Email, company name, industry
Employee count, revenue
Lead source tracking
Step 11b: Add Log Rejected Leads (FALSE branch)

Connect: Check Qualification Criteria (output 1) → Log Rejected Leads
Logs unqualified leads with:
Rejection reason
Timestamp
Review flag
⚙️ How to Setup
Configure Data Source URLs in Workflow Configuration node:

Public directory API endpoint
RSS feed URL for industry news
Social media API endpoint
Job board API endpoint
Adjust Qualification Criteria (optional):

Modify minEmployees (default: 50)
Update targetIndustries array
Change minRevenue (default: $1,000,000)
Update Parse and Normalize Data code to match your data sources' field names

Consider using specialized scraping services (Phantombuster, Apify, BrightData) for LinkedIn, Facebook, or other platforms with strict terms of service

Let me know if you'd like to adjust anything!

## Lead generation workflow
a Scrape targeted leads from public sourcesthat can
Pull company or creator data from public directories, RSS feeds, social profiles, or job boards. Enrich with Clearbit/People Data Labs. Push qualified entries into your CRM only when they meet criteria you define.
